# ForgeFrame

Local intelligence infrastructure. Memory, routing, scrubbing, agents — one install.

## What It Does

Persistent memory for AI agents. Memories weaken over time unless accessed. Tag something as a principle and it never decays. SQLite + FTS5 with optional Ollama embeddings. Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client.

Model routing across Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama. Intent signals pick the tier automatically. Quick questions go cheap, deep analysis goes frontier.

Localhost PII scrubbing. Strips sensitive data before it leaves your machine. Rehydrates on return.

Multi-agent orchestration in isolated git worktrees with shared memory.

## Install

```
claude mcp add forgeframe-memory -- npx @forgeframe/server
```

## Packages

@forgeframe/memory (MIT) — SQLite + FTS5, weighted retrieval, strength decay, embeddings
@forgeframe/server (MIT) — MCP server with 12 tools, HTTP daemon
@forgeframe/core (AGPL-3.0) — Tier-based model routing, provider registry
@forgeframe/proxy (AGPL-3.0) — PII scrubbing proxy

## Built By

Alexander Campos
https://campos.works
